mapper.select: SELECT * FROM lineitem WHERE orderid = #{orderId} ORDER BY linenum
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO lineitem (orderid, linenum, quantity, itemid, unitprice) VALUES
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.lineNumber}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.itemId}, #{item.unitPrice})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM lineitem WHERE itemid = #{itemId} ORDER BY orderid
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(quantity), 0) FROM lineitem WHERE itemid = #{itemId}
SELECT itemid, SUM(quantity) as total_quantity, COUNT(DISTINCT orderid) as order_count FROM lineitem GROUP BY itemid ORDER BY total_quantity DESC LIMIT #{limit}
